headlines: Slothful summer app lets you scroll simply by tilting your head
Destructive Windows backdoor stuffs multiple wipers and ransomware code into a single package
LisaFPGA brings Apple's magnificent misfire back in programmable logic
Orbital datacenter gold rush needs an environmental review, FCC told
crew_quote: "Is it just me, or does scrolling by tilting your head sound like the perfect excuse to avoid working while I dream of a curry? Now that's a summer plan!"
